guideline: Restock and clean the bench after use (EtOH sanitization, empty tip bins).
Empty the liquid waste container once it reaches the fill line.
Inform the person in charge in advance when using consumables in bulk.
Notify the person in charge if 10X buffer stocks are low.
HI-FBS: Thaw at 37°C, heat-inactivate at 60°C for 30 minutes, then aliquot.
Contact the person in charge in advance if aliquoting is required.
